'''鈭歡-s-v''' ('''kagasav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wheeple|wheeple]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-s-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wheeple|wheeple]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-s-v
|-
! Lemma
| kagasav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigasav|thigasav]] || [[word:jigasav|jigasav]] || [[word:shigasav|shigasav]] || [[word:kigasav|kigasav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugasav|thuthugasav]] || [[word:jujugasav|jujugasav]] || [[word:shushugasav|shushugasav]] || [[word:kukugasav|kukugasav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugasav|thugasav]] || [[word:jugasav|jugasav]] || [[word:shugasav|shugasav]] || [[word:kugasav|kugasav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugasav|thugasav]] || [[word:jugasav|jugasav]] || [[word:shugasav|shugasav]] || [[word:kugasav|kugasav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegasav|thegasav]] || [[word:jegasav|jegasav]] || [[word:shegasav|shegasav]] || [[word:kegasav|kegasav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogasav|thothogasav]] || [[word:jojogasav|jojogasav]] || [[word:shoshogasav|shoshogasav]] || [[word:kokogasav|kokogasav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogasav|thogasav]] || [[word:jogasav|jogasav]] || [[word:shogasav|shogasav]] || [[word:kogasav|kogasav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogasav|thogasav]] || [[word:jogasav|jogasav]] || [[word:shogasav|shogasav]] || [[word:kogasav|kogasav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gasav|gasav]] || [[word:gasav|gasav]] || [[word:gasav|gasav]] || [[word:gasav|gasav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gasav|gasav]] || [[word:gasav|gasav]] || [[word:gasav|gasav]] || [[word:gasav|gasav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gasav|gasav]] || [[word:gasav|gasav]] || [[word:gasav|gasav]] || [[word:gasav|gasav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gasav|gasav]] || [[word:gasav|gasav]] || [[word:gasav|gasav]] || [[word:gasav|gasav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gasav|th忙gasav]] || [[word:j忙gasav|j忙gasav]] || [[word:sh忙gasav|sh忙gasav]] || [[word:k忙gasav|k忙gasav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagasav|thathagasav]] || [[word:jajagasav|jajagasav]] || [[word:shashagasav|shashagasav]] || [[word:kakagasav|kakagasav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagasav|thagasav]] || [[word:jagasav|jagasav]] || [[word:shagasav|shagasav]] || [[word:kagasav|kagasav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagasav|thagasav]] || [[word:jagasav|jagasav]] || [[word:shagasav|shagasav]] || [[word:kagasav|kagasav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagasav|shagasav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagasav|goshagasav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagasav|gokishagasav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagasavn眉|shagasavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagasavnkn眉|goshagasavnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagasavn眉|gokishagasavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagasavsh毛|shagasavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagasavnksh毛|goshagasavnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagasavsh毛|gokishagasavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagasavro|shagasavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagasavnkro|goshagasavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagasavro|gokishagasavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagasavmu|shagasavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagasavnkmu|goshagasavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagasavmu|gokishagasavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagasavsher|shagasavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagasavnksher|goshagasavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagasavsher|gokishagasavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagasavng|shagasavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagasavnkng|goshagasavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagasavng|gokishagasavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagasavya|shagasavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagasavnkya|goshagasavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagasavya|gokishagasavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagasavyam|shagasavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagasavnkyam|goshagasavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagasavyam|gokishagasavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagasavn眉sh毛|shagasavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagasavnkn眉sh毛|goshagasavnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagasavn眉sh毛|gokishagasavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagasavn眉ro|shagasavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagasavnkn眉ro|goshagasavnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagasavn眉ro|gokishagasavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagasavn眉mu|shagasavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagasavnkn眉mu|goshagasavnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagasavn眉mu|gokishagasavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagasavsh毛n眉|shagasavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagasavnksh毛n眉|goshagasavnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagasavsh毛n眉|gokishagasavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagasavsh毛ro|shagasavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagasavnksh毛ro|goshagasavnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagasavsh毛ro|gokishagasavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagasavsh毛mu|shagasavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagasavnksh毛mu|goshagasavnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagasavsh毛mu|gokishagasavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagasavron眉|shagasavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagasavnkron眉|goshagasavnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagasavron眉|gokishagasavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagasavrosh毛|shagasavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagasavnkrosh毛|goshagasavnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagasavrosh毛|gokishagasavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagasavromu|shagasavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagasavnkromu|goshagasavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagasavromu|gokishagasavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagasavmun眉|shagasavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagasavnkmun眉|goshagasavnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagasavmun眉|gokishagasavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagasavmush毛|shagasavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagasavnkmush毛|goshagasavnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagasavmush毛|gokishagasavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagasavmuro|shagasavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagasavnkmuro|goshagasavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagasavmuro|gokishagasavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d414c41}}
